intro: One hot match leads to another.
description:
Ready to line things up and see where it leads? Match colorful pieces, chain together juicy combos, and clear the board to reveal a gorgeous surprise waiting underneath.

Every move clears a little more of the picture. Keep crushing tiles, breaking through tougher boards, and revealing beautiful girls piece by piece. The deeper you go, the hotter it gets... so stay sharp and keep the matches coming.

Features:
- A collection of beautiful women to reveal
- Unique music for every girl
- Simple and engaging match-3 gameplay
- Satisfying combos and challenging stages
- A treat for your eyes

Your crush is waiting for you.
